query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A paved walkway runs alongside a body of water, bordered by a black wrought-iron fence with decorative posts on the left and ornate metal park benches on the right. Bare, leafless tree branches with intricate twigs extend overhead and frame the scene. In the distance, a solitary figure walks away from the camera. Fog reduces visibility throughout the scene, partially obscuring the trees and the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A paved walkway alongside a body of water under bare winter trees, rendered in heavily muted and faded gray tones. The dense fog creates flat, directionless lighting that eliminates shadows and collapses depth, while the low contrast produces a suffocating, oppressive atmosphere across the entire frame. Ornate iron benches line the right side and a decorative metal fence borders the water on the left, with a solitary figure silhouetted in the distance. The bleak, washed-out scene evokes atmospheric distress, isolation, and unease.
